jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates:
Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates!
